pi_items.source: Verified in setup_task.sh (line 8: rm -f /home/ga/Desktop/winter_major_bracket.drawio), export_result.sh (line 23: DRAWIO_PATH), and task description
Verified in setup_task.sh (line 9: rm -f /home/ga/Desktop/winter_major_bracket.png), export_result.sh (line 24: PNG_PATH), and task description
Verified in setup_task.sh (line 11: rm -f /tmp/bracket_ground_truth.json, lines 107-108: saves ground truth JSON here), and export_result.sh (line 25: GROUND_TRUTH_PATH)

privileged_info_summary: The task uses three filenames for the esports tournament bracket: a draw.io diagram saved as 'winter_major_bracket.drawio', a PNG export as 'winter_major_bracket.png', and a hidden ground truth JSON file at '/tmp/bracket_ground_truth.json'. The data is synthetic—randomly generated each time by selecting 8 teams from a pool of 12 real esports organizations (T1, G2 Esports, Team Liquid, Cloud9, Fnatic, FaZe Clan, NAVI, Team Vitality, Gen.G, DRX, 100 Thieves, EDG). The setup script generates random match results for quarterfinals, semifinals, and a grand final, then saves the expected winners to the hidden ground truth file for verification.
